views.text: Mortimer Asks: Sick of Summer yet?
No! I've barely gotten to enjoy it!
views.signature: [class]android.widget.TextView[resource_id]None[text]No! I've barely gotten to enjoy it![enabled,,]

views.text: Yes! My skin sticks to all things leather and leatherette!
Why was there a chocolate on my pillow this morning?
Oh! I'm practicing for if I turn this place into a vacation rental. Putting mints on pillows is Hospitality 101!
Hospitality staff usually doesn't shove a mini Krackel under my head at 2am.
